info.description: Sports data and odds collection microservice. Goracle is the single source of truth for sports events, betting odds, and outcome results.
info.title: Goracle API

post.description: Trigger manual odds collection for a specific sport (nba or nfl)
Trigger manual odds collection for all supported sports

get.description: Returns event with full details including all markets and outcomes. Use market query parameter to filter to specific market types (e.g., market=h2h for head-to-head only, market=spreads,totals for multiple markets). Defaults to H2H-only market filtering when no market parameter is provided. Completed events include computed winner field. H2H odds (home_team_odds and away_team_odds) are included when available in American odds format (e.g., -192 for favorites, +160 for underdogs). Odds fields are omitted from the response when unavailable.

parameters.description: Market filter (e.g., 'h2h', 'spreads', 'totals', or comma-separated 'spreads,totals'). Defaults to 'h2h' if not provided.
parameters.name: market

post.description: Manually settle an event with final scores for all H2H markets
Trigger one-time API call to resolve a stale event by ID (NO RETRIES)

get.description:
Returns matches within a specified time window with flexible sport matching and timezone handling. H2H odds are included at the top level when available.

**Sport Matching (Flexible & Case-Insensitive):**
- Accepts multiple formats: "nba", "NBA", "basketball_nba" all match NBA games
- Accepts multiple formats: "nfl", "NFL", "americanfootball_nfl" all match NFL games
- Matches against both sport_title and sport_key fields (case-insensitive)
- Input is normalized (lowercase, trimmed whitespace) before matching

**H2H Odds (Included When Available):**
- home_team_odds and away_team_odds are included in each match when available
- Odds use American odds format (e.g., -192 for favorites, +160 for underdogs)
- Odds fields are omitted from the response when unavailable (e.g., event not yet published, market suspended)
- Example: {"home_team_odds": -192, "away_team_odds": 160} or fields omitted entirely when unavailable

**Timezone Handling (ISO 8601 Format):**
- Input timestamps must be in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2025-11-04T03:10:00Z)
- Timestamps without timezone indicator are assumed to be UTC
- Timestamps with timezone offset are converted to UTC (e.g., 2025-11-04T03:10:00-05:00)
- Output timestamps are always returned in ISO 8601 format with UTC indicator (Z)
- Example formats: "2025-11-04T03:10:00Z", "2025-11-04T03:10:00.000Z", "2025-11-04T03:10:00-05:00"

**Performance & Limits:**
- Maximum 1000 matches returned per request to prevent memory issues
- Results ordered by commence_time ascending
- Typical response time: < 500ms for 1-hour to 7-day windows

**Error Responses:**
- 400 Bad Request: Missing required parameters (sport, from, to)
- 400 Bad Request: Invalid ISO 8601 timestamp format
- 400 Bad Request: 'from' timestamp is after 'to' timestamp
- 500 Internal Server Error: Database or system errors

parameters.description: Sport key (case-insensitive, matches sport_title or sport_key). Examples: 'nba', 'NBA', 'basketball_nba', 'nfl', 'NFL', 'americanfootball_nfl'
parameters.name: sport

parameters.description: Start of time window in ISO 8601 format. UTC assumed if no timezone. Examples: '2025-11-04T03:10:00Z', '2025-11-04T03:10:00-05:00'. Defaults to now.
parameters.name: from

parameters.description: End of time window in ISO 8601 format. UTC assumed if no timezone. Examples: '2025-11-04T04:10:00Z', '2025-11-04T04:10:00+00:00'. Defaults to 7 days from now.
parameters.name: to

400.description: Invalid parameters: missing required fields, invalid timestamp format, or invalid time range

500.description: Internal server error: database or system failure

get.description: Returns multiple events with simplified details for efficient bulk queries (max 50)
Returns all outcomes for a given event across all markets and bookmakers
Returns a single outcome by UUID - used by Khronos to validate predictions

post.description: Manually settles an outcome - used primarily for player props

get.description: Returns ALL available outcomes (no limit, no random) for caching purposes
Returns all flat, denormalized outcome data for Khronos processing
Check if the service is healthy

message.example: Odds collection started for all sports

winner.description: Winner is the name of the winning team or "Draw" if scores are equal; populated when final scores are available

message.example: Stale event resolution started (ONE attempt only)

note.example: Check logs for resolution status. No automatic retries.
